item.title: Dead Horse Bay’s Hidden Artifact
item.description: Explore the discovery of a historical artifact linked to the nuclear era at Dead Horse Bay, and its significance in a broader environmental context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Dead Horse Bay’s Hidden Artifact
media:content.media:description: Explore the discovery of a historical artifact linked to the nuclear era at Dead Horse Bay, and its significance in a broader environmental context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Tiny Finds Recovered from Thames Mud
item.description: Join a careful search through Thames mud to recover small artefacts, highlighting preservation, discovery, and historical insights. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Tiny Finds Recovered from Thames Mud
media:content.media:description: Join a careful search through Thames mud to recover small artefacts, highlighting preservation, discovery, and historical insights. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Tiny Artefacts Take Center Stage
item.description: Explore a collection of tiny artefacts and the details that make them unique, from craftsmanship to historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Tiny Artefacts Take Center Stage
media:content.media:description: Explore a collection of tiny artefacts and the details that make them unique, from craftsmanship to historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A century-old gem uncovered in the mud
item.description: See the discovery of a long-buried item preserved in mud for over a century, and explore its condition and historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A century-old gem uncovered in the mud
media:content.media:description: See the discovery of a long-buried item preserved in mud for over a century, and explore its condition and historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Why 19th-Century Poison Bottles Were Bright Blue
item.description: An explanation of why many 19th-century poison bottles were made in bright blue glass, focusing on safety design and visibility to prevent accidental misuse.

media:content.media:title: Why 19th-Century Poison Bottles Were Bright Blue
media:content.media:description: An explanation of why many 19th-century poison bottles were made in bright blue glass, focusing on safety design and visibility to prevent accidental misuse.

item.title: A Thames Find for the Collection
item.description: A mudlarking discovery along the Thames adds a unique item to a growing collection, highlighting history found along the river.

media:content.media:title: A Thames Find for the Collection
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking discovery along the Thames adds a unique item to a growing collection, highlighting history found along the river.
